name: U Banquet Group Holding Limited
summary: U Banquet Group Holding Limited, an investment holding company, operates and franchises a chain of Chinese restaurants in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through Chinese Restaurant and Wedding Business, Property Leasing Business, Securities Trading Business, and Environmental Maintenance Business segments. The company operates full-service Chinese restaurants, which offer wedding banquet and dining services, as well as catering services. It also provides environmental maintenance services, including janitorial services on streets and public areas, waste management services, and facility maintenance management. In addition, the company distributes fresh vegetables and fruit, seafood, and frozen meat; and trades in securities. As of December 31, 2019, it operated a total four restaurants under the U Banquet, U Kitchen, and U Pot brands. The company is headquartered in Taikoo Shing, Hong Kong.
